name: subboost-oidc-client-integration
title: SubBoost OIDC client integration
description: Implement a minimal real SubBoost OIDC client flow against MoAuth Connect: login start, callback, PKCE/state/nonce validation, local admin binding/allowlist semantics, and reuse of SubBoost local session.
creator: codex-agent
notes: Implementation complete. OIDC login start + callback routes added with PKCE/state/nonce validation, JWKS ID token verification, userinfo subject cross-check, and allowlist provisioning via @moauth/connect-contract. LocalAdmin.identitySubjectId column added via Prisma migration. Local login UI now shows 'MoAuth 账号登录' action. 9/9 OIDC route tests pass; local lint + typecheck pass. Ready for commit.
